flagged_lines: Malli.
Loki, the money they have given you was not for the song.
They’ve bought your daughter.
MALLI!
Malli.
Malli... Malli...
My child.
Please give me back my child.
I fall at your feet.
I beg you!
I beg you. I fall at your feet.
chunks.peak_line: Loki, the money they have given you was not for the song.

flagged_lines: Sergeant!
Do you comprehend the value of the bullet in your barrel?
it cost One Pound.
One Pound Sterling!
And you would want to squander it on
Please don’t take my child away I’m begging you
THE FIRE
Release our leader Lala Lajpat Rai! Otherwise we’ll burn down this police station!
Release our leader Lala Lajpat Rai!
They are rioting here because Lala Lajpat Rai has been arrested in Calcutta.
They’re rabid!
We need reinforcements NOW!
Hold the line, damn it!
Let’s burn them down!
Arrest that bastard
bring him to me
You double-crosser!
You filthy traitor!
chunks.peak_line: Do you comprehend the value of the bullet in your barrel?

flagged_lines: Good God!
I was scared out of my wits, sir!
He scares me more.
As for the rest of you,
better luck next year.
Disperse!
chunks.peak_line: I was scared out of my wits, sir!

flagged_lines: THE WATER
he brought back with him a little girl.
Why so?
It is a Gond child that you've brought, sir.
- So? - So what?
Do they have two horns on their head?
They are an innocent people, sir.
Even if you oppress them they won't raise their voice.
But they have a trait.
They like staying in herds like sheep.
Even if one lamb goes missing it causes them great distress.
So this tribal is going to shoot down the mighty British empire
So is this tribal going to take us down?
If at that time the lamb is in the tiger's mouth
he will break its teeth, pry its jaws open
and take the lamb back to its herd.
It seems that the shepherd has come to Delhi to begin his hunt.
FOREST OUTSIDE DELHI
The trap is set. Alert our brother.
Jangu, it's not a wolf. It's a tiger.
Jangu!
I am using you for my need.
Malli is alive?
Akthar.
Where did you disappear off to?
Give it to me.
Hey! You!
I’ve been kicking and kicking
What’s the bloody trick?
so that you can charge me again?
You cheating bastard!
This will never happen again, sir! I beg you.
Oh God!
Son.
He is a monster.
Look how badly he has beaten him.
If they come to know the truth about me...
they will punish you all for giving me shelter.
Come what may, I'll never let anyone know my true identity.
We will apprehend this bugger.
Though I would rather roast this swine on a bed of coals.
The one that accomplishes the impossible
will be promoted to the rank of special officer.
If anyone can do the job, it’s him.
You bring him dead, you receive a bounty.
You bring him alive, you will be promoted to special officer.
He will come there.
He will think that his enemy's enemies are his friends.
Stop, stop it.
- Why are you hitting him like that? - He's forgotten his ID, ma'am.
That doesn't give you the right to treat him like an animal.
Freedom is our birthright.
chunks.peak_line: Come what may, I'll never let anyone know my true identity.

flagged_lines: We don't have to beg for our rights.
Why beat around the bush?
We should hit them where it hurts.
Let's kill Governor Scott.
Why not just kill King George?
I said that it would be better to kill King George.
Why can't we kill him?
Scott has done a grave injustice to us, brother.
ID.
Brother! Brother!
What happened?
He chased me like a cheetah.
- A police officer? - Jangu
Come here.
When I got to know that he is a police officer, I escaped from him.
If word gets out we’ll all be killed.
Don’t let anyone see you.
Don't come out until I tell you.
Raju, once you step on a snake's shadow, you never find it again.
We won't find him.
The promise we have made to the village will not be fulfilled.
We won't find Malli.
chunks.peak_line: We should hit them where it hurts.

flagged_lines: Save me! Save me!
Does anybody have anything? A boat or a rope?
- Are you mad? - No, please don't say that.
He's a child. Let's help him.
Save me! Save me!
- Raju - Akhtar.
My father. - Greetings.
- My mother. - Greetings.
How does it matter to hunger what hand you eat with, Ammi?
Chandini Chowk?
Don't cast evil eye on him, uncle.
Brother.
Why are you blushing, brother? Did someone special give you this?
I thought so. What’s her name?
Seetha.
Ram and Seetha.
He is missing. I'm trying to find him.
Why didn't you ask me?
Yeah, right? Why didn't I ask you?
Show me, brother. If he is from around here I'll recognize him instantly.
chunks.peak_line: He is missing. I'm trying to find him.

flagged_lines: Is she that beautiful?
Brother, to speak to a girl you shouldn't try to find a way.
You should pave your own path.
Stop here? But why?
She’ll stop here?
Oh no.
How did you know that the car would stop here?
I threw some nails on the road.
The tyres have gotten punctured.
Wow! You’re so clever.
She will thank me. That way, we can speak to each other.
Is that it?
- Yes. - Wonderful, let me get my things.
Thank you.
Oh, don't call me madam. It's just Jenny, yes?
Such a big name!
It is just Jenny
Don't call me memsaab. It is just Jenny, yes.
This isn’t for you.
Malli.
This is for her.
This will go well with that dress.
How beautiful!
She is going to love it.
chunks.peak_line: You should pave your own path.

flagged_lines: Did you make this?
Please come with me.
I would love to see you again.
Look what I bought for you.
Brother Brother
I spoke to her.
Yeah? How's your girlfriend?
I mean your lover, girlfriend
Don’t say that. It’s wrong.
Wrong?
If she didn’t like you would she hop on your bike?
'Don't call me memsaab, it is Jenny yes'
Don't call me memsaab, it is Jenny yes.
That’s not her name.
Oh, Jenny.
It's a small name only.
But while she was leaving
She invited you to a party? That too on the first meeting?
Feb 14th... hey, it’s today... right now.
Stop eating, leave now.
It’s been so long since I’ve been to a party. I simply can’t wait to dance.
You are looking at the best dancer around here.
Come, let’s join the party.
- Oh, he’s great. - Wonderful.
You’re a natural.
chunks.peak_line: I would love to see you again.

flagged_lines: Oh, I’m so sorry, don’t worry, it’ll come out.
I am so sorry.
Every damn wanker thinks he can dance.
What do you think of yourself, huh!? You country oaf.
Look at all these brown buggers.
Can you do any of these? Huh?
Not salsa. Not Flamenco, my brother.
I’ve had enough of this nonsense!
You two! Out!
No Jake. I’ve had enough of your bullying.
Go!
This is disgusting! This is filthy!
- Ram! Ram! Ram! - No.
Yes!
Oh God!
How much further should I carry you? - Don't say that brother! I beg you.
If I take another step my legs will fall off. Please carry me a little longer.
When you looked at me like that I just felt like competing with you.
Are you hurt? What’s happened? Is he alright?
She is inviting you to her house for a cup of coffee.
Alright, bye.
I don’t understand the need for such elaborate security measures.
Have you checked every door?
Robert, what are you doing? He is with me.
He is here by my invitation. Let him go.
I’ll show him the back entrance.
Robert! Robert!
He is not a servant.
He is my friend. Let him go.
That was appalling behavior. I apologize.
I'm so sorry.
I was really looking forward to this.
I have so much that I wanted to show you.
Please. Come, sit down.
Your dance at the party took my breath away.
The beat pulsating through your body
the flying feet, the flashing eyes...
Brother!
Brother.
Brother.
Listen, I’ll come back to take you from here.
Brother.
So you are not taking me with you now?
No! I want to go home. Take me away now!
I won't be here for another moment.
Won’t you listen to me? Listen to me, Malli-
- I won't listen to you. - Don't make noise.
Brother. Brother.
Please don't leave me here.
I want to go back to my mother.
Please take me home.
chunks.peak_line: Robert, what are you doing? He is with me.

flagged_lines: Mother
Don't these white women bear children?
Don't they know what pain is?
They took away a child and locked her in a cage.
how painful tears are.
We need to get Malli back.
We shouldn't be scared anymore.
We should surge forward.
Whoever comes in our way should be eliminated.
My brother is on a mission, and he is not going to be captured.
Especially not by traitors like you.
A dog can never hunt down a tiger.
Nobody is coming, sister.
Seetha...
- No, uncle. - Has he at least written a letter?
What is this? It has been 4 years since he left.
How much longer should we wait for him?
Does he even remember us?
Does he remember his village, his land, the promise he has made us?
Forget about us.
Does he at least remember you?
You will keep experiencing this pain until I get an answer.
chunks.peak_line: Don't these white women bear children?

flagged_lines: where is your brother?
Even the English don't have a cure for its venom.
You are going to die within an hour.
We should execute our plan tonight at any cost.
If we miss this oppurtunity, we might not get another one.
We should storm in as soon as the arrangements are done.
Let’s go.
Jangu, go right now and memorize the sound of the gates.
What happened?
Brother.
Brother, what happened? Brother.
Brother. Brother.
You’ll be fine.
Looks like the poison has taken effect.
Why are you removing the holy thread?
Don’t do it, brother.
Removing it will bring you problems.
Brother needs it more than me.
Don’t close your eyes, brother. I’m here with you.
You’ll be fine. I’m here with you.
You’re out of danger now. The antidote is working against the poison.
Brother.
If I had a choice I would stay with you.
But I have to go.
Brother
I’ve hidden a truth from you.
I'm not Akhtar. I'm not a muslim.
I’m Bheem. Son of the Gonds.
chunks.peak_line: You are going to die within an hour.

flagged_lines: They took away a little girl from our village.
But I didn't do so because I didn’t want to put your life in danger.
Not because I don’t trust you.
We are going tonight to rescue Malli.
If I don't make it...
I have your friendship which is more precious than my life.
I'll die with pride.
Until next time, brother.
‘I have your friendship which is more precious than my life.’
‘Brother needs it more than me.’
And what a magnificent event you have organized, ma'am.
chunks.peak_line: Not because I don’t trust you.
